title: Color Picker
description: This simple fabric mod gets the color of a block and prints its value in RGB, HSL, CMYK, HEX and even decimal.
body:
This mod basically shows you the color value you need from a given block, you enable it through a keybinding, you set the keybinding in Minecraft Options to whatever you want, and right click a block. The values are printed to the console.

Supported values:
* RGB
* HEX
* HSL
* CMYK
* DECIMAL
